identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a hyperlocal discovery app that feels human, organic, and expertly curated, avoiding generic SaaS aesthetics.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Organic Nature with Urban Modernism.
Emotion First: Every screen must evoke the feeling of 'Discovery'.
Content is King: Photos are the heroes; text is the guide.
Zoom In: Use bold close-ups for food and textures.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to create breathing room.
anti_patterns: No pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF).

BottomNav.specs: Fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-md bg-white/10 dark:bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 rounded-full shadow-2xl p-2 flex justify-around items-center z-50

FeedCard.specs: rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative group transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02] shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl
FeedCard.overlay: bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent absolute inset-0 z-10

MapMarker.specs: bg-white dark:bg-zinc-900 text-sm font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full shadow-lg border-2 border-primary transform transition-transform hover:scale-110 flex items-center gap-1

hero_places.description: Modern building against a mountain backdrop
Modern curved building with balconies by the water
Modern building interior with wood accents and plants

food_drink.description: A white plate topped with a piece of toast covered in avocado
Aesthetic display of toast adorned with pink flowers on pastel settings
Aesthetic breakfast setup featuring bread with red caviar

interiors.description: Modern cafe seating area with pillows and counter

implementation_steps.action: Add Google Fonts link for Fraunces and Plus Jakarta Sans to index.html.
Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Organic Urban' color palette and font families.
Update index.css to set base font sizes and smooth scrolling (lenis recommended if possible, otherwise scroll-behavior: smooth).
Create the floating bottom navigation using the 'Floating Glass' style.
Implement Leaflet map with custom markers. Use 'react-leaflet'. Hide default zoom controls. Add custom controls.
Create a 'Bento Grid' layout for the home feed using the 'hero_places', 'food_drink', and 'interiors' images.

universal_guidelines: Do not use 'blue' as primary color.
Ensure dark mode text contrast is accessible (gray-200, not gray-400).
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
